issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Decision Engine fully tested and working. Decision Engine page at /decision-engine shows Financial Health Score (0-100 with 6 dimensions), Retirement Success Probability (Monte Carlo simulation), and Top 3 Actions with dollar impact. Life Timeline page at /life-timeline has interactive sliders for age, retirement, savings, returns and shows year-by-year net worth projections with milestones. Add Life Event dialog works. All backend APIs use actual calculations (not mocked). Compliance modal appears on first visit - set localStorage key 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to bypass.

Interactive sliders (age, retirement, life expectancy, savings, returns)
